entries.statement: The ranker contract: a candidate ranker must pass the ranking-separation fuzz.

canonical.statement: The ranker contract: a candidate ranker must pass the ranking-separation fuzz.

extensions.ceiling_statement: Passing this oracle warrants that grade-bearing fields are unchanged and no row is added or dropped under this fuzz; it does not warrant the ranker's ordering is good, fair, or free of every possible manipulation.

entries.statement: The skin contract: a candidate skin must pass token completeness, grade-scale monotonicity, and contrast.

canonical.statement: The skin contract: a candidate skin must pass token completeness, grade-scale monotonicity, and contrast.

extensions.ceiling_statement: Passing this oracle warrants the token set is complete, monotonic, and legible; it does not warrant the skin is beautiful, on-brand, or preferred by any reader.

entries.statement: The client contract: a candidate client must reproduce the reference client's reads and, if proposing, its admission path.

canonical.statement: The client contract: a candidate client must reproduce the reference client's reads and, if proposing, its admission path.

extensions.ceiling_statement: Passing this pair warrants byte-identical reads and identical admission behavior against the published artifacts at time of test; it does not warrant the client is trustworthy, maintained, or free of unrelated defects.

entries.statement: learn-efficiently: this app's own default ranker, loaded through the identical public extension seam any candidate uses.

sources.description: a conformance oracle that only executes in this repository's own CI (build/check-conformance-read.mjs and build/check-conformance-write.mjs, the independent-minimal-client pair), cited as recomputable in the repository, never as app-verified

this deployment's own conformance oracles (build/check-extension-seam.mjs's ranking-separation fuzz, build/check-skins.mjs's per-skin assertions, and other sandbox-executable checks), re-run directly against the artifact each artifact-card claim names
